prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, let's tackle this head-on! Remember, the hardest part is getting started. Once you dive in, you'll find your rhythm and the task will become more manageable. Break it down into smaller steps if you need to, and celebrate each little victory along the way. You've got this! Your determination and skills will see you through. Take a deep breath, believe in yourself, and let's get this done. I'm cheering you on every step of the way!
